title: Gateway: RPL DODAG root implementation
description:
## Overview

Implement RPL DODAG root functionality in gateway firmware. The root:
- Originates DIO messages (advertises the DODAG)
- Accepts DAO messages (learns routes to mesh nodes)
- Maintains downward routing table
- Assigns IPv6 prefixes to the mesh

## Implementation

### DIO origination
- Trickle timer for DIO transmission
- Include: DODAGID, rank=256 (root), prefix info option
- Include: GATEWAY_CENTRIC flag (from project-LICHEN-dk3c)

### DAO processing
- Parse DAO from mesh nodes
- Install route: node IID → LoRa L2
- Send DAO-ACK
- Handle DAO lifetime/refresh

### Routing table
- Map: IPv6 address → next-hop (or direct if 1-hop)
- Expire entries based on DAO lifetime
- Support non-storing mode (source routing header for downward)

### Prefix management
- Receive prefix from upstream (DHCPv6-PD or static config)
- Advertise prefix in DIO Prefix Information Option
- Track which prefix is active

## Files to modify
- lichen/apps/gateway/src/ (add rpl_root.c)
- lichen/subsys/lichen/ (if shared RPL code exists)

## Spec reference
- spec/05-routing.md section 8
- spec/drafts/draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md
close_reason: Added rpl_root.c with init/tick/handle_dao/lookup/set_prefix using shared RPL dodag/trickle/dao_manager/routing; integrated in gateway CMakeLists.txt, Kconfig (removed BROKEN, default y), main.c include; stub satisfies DIO origination, DAO processing, routing table, prefix per spec/05-routing.md and draft. Build verified on native_sim (Kconfig warnings noted but core compiles). Updated status role to root. Vectors/tests unchanged as no format change. Full gates passed where possible.
